creator: baptiste@bapt.name
text:
Created attachment 253192
Drop deprecated / boggus port sysutils/pydf

Delete port that is not working properly on FreeBSD, with inactive upstream.

This software was really mean for GNU/Linux and upstream is inactive: https://github.com/garabik/pydf

See also https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=252031

Thanks!
